title: AEP v1.1 F19 Corpus Coverage Witness
description: v1.1 F19 STAGED anti-convergence primitive (SPECULATIVE FRONTIER × FRONTIER_OTHER; single-source from adversary attack on legion synthesis). Every agent invocation declares expected_corpus_scope[]; validator computes touched-set from hook log + emits coverage_gap[]. Closes the recall-COMPLETENESS direction (vs F12 which covers recall-FROM-touched-packets). Composes_with: F12 recall_layer_v1, sec50 EH Law-3 multi-lens, sec73.6 NO-OPERATOR-REACTION-CALIBRATION (gaps surface unshaped).

invocation_id.description: Session/dispatch identifier for the invocation under audit.

expected_corpus_scope.description: Glob-style or packet_id-pattern list the agent declared it SHOULD have considered. e.g. ['doctrine/02-truth-tags.html', 'doctrine/lessons/sibling-13*'].

touched_packet_ids.description: Packet IDs the agent actually read during the invocation. Sourced from the PreToolUse Read hook log.

justification_text.description: Agent's justification for the gap. Empty if not yet justified.

coverage_gap.description: Items declared in expected_corpus_scope but absent from touched_packet_ids. Agent MUST justify each gap (or the witness emits AEP11_F19_GAP_UNJUSTIFIED).

hook_log_path.description: Path to the PreToolUse Read hook log used to compute touched_packet_ids. Audit-replayable.

coverage_ratio.description: Validator-computed: |touched intersect expected| / |expected|. 1.0 = full coverage. <1.0 = gaps exist.

adversary_attack_id.description: Reference to the adversary attack that surfaced this primitive. Default: adversary-2026-05-18-v11-convergence-map-attack.

convergence_count.description: F19 is single-source by design (only adversary surfaced; no other agent converged). 1 = honest single-source attribution per sec73.6.

single_source_attribution.description: F19 ships with explicit single-source attribution per sec73.6 NO-OPERATOR-REACTION-CALIBRATION (do not pretend convergence we don't have).

coverage_gap.justification_text: v0.5* specs were superseded by v0.8 STABLE; pathfinder dispatch did not need to re-read them.
